name: speakable
description: Speakable - Browser-based TTS player for WordPress
author: Devshagor

scripts.zip: npm run build && rm -rf production && mkdir -p production/speakable && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.gitignore' --exclude='.gitattributes' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='production' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' --exclude='README.md' --exclude='.editorconfig' --exclude='.eslintrc' --exclude='.prettierrc' ./ production/speakable/ && cd production && zip -r speakable.zip speakable/ && rm -rf speakable && echo '✓ production/speakable.zip is ready'
